top.name: Glyph Network
top.rules_text: Trigger all of your prepared glyphs at once. Each deals its effect plus 1 bonus damage per other glyph triggered.

bottom.name: Spell Anchor
bottom.rules_text: Prepare a glyph within 4. The next spell you cast while standing on it is cast twice.

upgrades.description: The network adds more per glyph. The anchor banks Weave.

changes.value: Trigger all your glyphs at once. Each deals its effect plus 2 per other glyph triggered.
Prepare a glyph within 4. The next spell cast while standing on it is cast twice. Gain 1 Weave.

upgrades.description: Living Network: the glyphs are not consumed.

changes.value: Trigger all your glyphs at once (not consumed). Each deals +2 per other glyph triggered.

upgrades.description: Echo Anchor: also reduces the doubled spell's cost.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4. The next spell cast on it is cast twice and costs 1 less. Gain 1 Weave.

upgrades.description: Overload Network: also banks Weave per glyph.

changes.value: Trigger all your glyphs (not consumed). Each deals +2 per other; gain 1 Weave per glyph.

upgrades.description: Triple Anchor: the spell is cast three times.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4. The next spell cast on it is cast 3 times and costs 1 less. Gain 1 Weave.

upgrades.description: The Whole Cloth: a devastating, reusable detonation.

changes.value: Trigger all your glyphs twice (not consumed). Each deals +3 per other glyph; gain 1 Weave per glyph.

upgrades.description: Eternal Anchor: a permanent doubling throne.

changes.value: Prepare a permanent glyph. Every spell cast while standing on it is cast 3 times and costs 1 less. Gain 1 Weave/use.
